overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player traversing a foggy desert wasteland at night. The player moves through Joshua tree scrubland toward a distant neon-lit city skyline, then turns to follow a rocky hillside with the urban sprawl visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through desert terrain dotted with Joshua trees, approaching the distant neon-lit city

entered.detail: spiky yucca trees scattered across the sandy desert terrain
distant futuristic metropolis with glowing red and white billboards atop glass skyscrapers
sandy and rocky ground with sparse dry vegetation

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a foggy desert landscape at night, surrounded by Joshua trees. The distant city skyline glows with neon lights on the right horizon while the camera moves steadily forward through the sandy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert with panoramic city view

events.description: camera completes turn to face the city skyline directly, revealing power transmission towers
camera begins turning left away from the city toward the rocky hillside

agents.ego_description: panning across the city skyline to observe the neon-lit skyscrapers and electrical infrastructure

entered.detail: tall metal electrical pylons with multiple cross-arms and high-voltage lines

segments.scene_description: The player turns to face the city directly, bringing the neon skyline and power transmission towers into central view. After observing the cityscape, the camera begins turning left toward the rocky terrain, and the Joshua trees pass out of view behind the camera.

events.description: terrain shifts from flat desert scrub to rocky hillside base

agents.ego_description: traversing the base of a rocky hillside with the illuminated city visible in the background to the right

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain with layered stone formations and boulders

segments.scene_description: The player moves along the base of a large rocky hillside that now dominates the left side of the frame. The power transmission towers pass behind as the terrain becomes more rugged, while the neon city remains visible in the distant background to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy desert wasteland that shifts from an open scrubland toward a rugged rocky hillside. It begins with a steady forward trek through sandy terrain and Joshua trees, with a neon-lit city skyline glowing on the right horizon. As the camera turns to face the city directly, the urban sprawl and towering power transmission lines move into central view before the perspective pivots left. The scene then shifts away from the trees and toward the base of a massive rocky hillside that begins to dominate the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera moves along this rugged terrain as the transmission towers recede, while the distant neon city remains a constant beacon in the background.
